primary_result: HubBot completed the 2026-06-06 run: no visible new members required welcomes; the required AI-news post was published in General as Hub Bot and verified visible in the authenticated feed. The hardened API publisher was updated to match the live frontend endpoint/header behavior and to use active browser-session cookies in memory when the on-disk cookie database is stale.

published_post.title: AI News: Google is putting search agents inside everyday workflows
published_post.post_url_note: The create API returned HTTP 200 but did not expose a thread ID or URL; authenticated feed verification confirmed visibility.
